title: Set up Storybook for Next.js
summary: Initialize Storybook 8 with Next.js support, write component stories, configure addons, and run visual and interaction tests.
declaration: I will set up Storybook 8 in this Next.js project for UI component development and documentation. This includes the Next.js Storybook framework, essential addons, and example stories. If you also want interaction tests (play functions) or Chromatic visual regression, say so before I begin.
